testcase.name: test_02_register_player_saves_to_mongodb

failure.message: AssertionError: No player data returned assert 'player' in {'seat': 3, 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 1, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 0, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_mongodb_persistence.py:90: in test_02_register_player_saves_to_mongodb assert "player" in data, "No player data returned" E AssertionError: No player data returned E assert 'player' in {'seat': 3, 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 1, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 0, ...}}

testcase.name: test_my_history_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_mongodb_persistence.py:319: in test_my_history_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"History failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: History failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
